description: Sector overlay for sports clubs, federations, academies, events, athlete welfare, anti-doping, safeguarding, and sports-governance documentation in Togo.

metadata.scope: Togo-only sector overlay controls for Sports. Intended to be used with togo_core_control_library.
metadata.source_note: Source basis is mapped from Togolese and applicable regional legal/regulatory sources available at rule-pack publication time. This starter pack is not legal advice and requires expert validation before production reliance.
metadata.external_knowledge_policy: No external knowledge is introduced during document evaluation. Regulatory source mappings live only in this versioned rule pack.

primary_sources.name: Law No. 2021-008 on organization, functioning, and development of physical and sports activities in Togo / FONADES materials
primary_sources.issuer: Ministry of Youth and Sports / Togolese Republic

primary_sources.name: Togo Ministry of Youth and Sports official materials
primary_sources.issuer: Ministry of Youth and Sports / Togolese Republic

primary_sources.name: WADA Code and anti-doping reference framework
Togo personal data protection law materials
primary_sources.issuer: Togolese Republic / Personal Data Protection Authority

limitations: Rules encode document-evidence checks, not a final legal determination.
Each rule requires validation against current Togolese laws, regional WAEMU/OHADA/CIMA instruments, regulator circulars, directives, codes and guidance before production reliance.
Automated results are screening signals only and require qualified human legal/compliance review.

rules.title: Sports organization, federation, academy, or event authorization evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for sport organization registration, federation affiliation, academy authorization, event permit, or ministry approval evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Togolese legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, current-law status, and legal sufficiency before relying on the automated result.
source_basis: Law No. 2021-008 on organization, functioning, and development of physical and sports activities in Togo / FONADES materials

rules.title: Sports governance, statutes, or financial-management controls are documented
rules.summary: Checks for statutes, board, governance, accounts, budget, FONADES funding, or reporting evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Togolese legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, current-law status, and legal sufficiency before relying on the automated result.
source_basis: Law No. 2021-008 on organization, functioning, and development of physical and sports activities in Togo / FONADES materials

rules.title: Anti-doping controls or athlete education evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for anti-doping policy, prohibited substances, testing, TUE, athlete education, or WADA evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Togolese legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, current-law status, and legal sufficiency before relying on the automated result.
source_basis: WADA Code and anti-doping reference framework

rules.title: Safeguarding, minor protection, or athlete-welfare evidence is documented
rules.summary: Checks for safeguarding, child protection, athlete welfare, harassment, abuse reporting, medical care, or emergency evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Togolese legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, current-law status, and legal sufficiency before relying on the automated result.
source_basis: Togo Ministry of Youth and Sports official materials

rules.title: Athlete personal, medical, or minor-data privacy evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for privacy notice, consent, medical records, athlete data, minor data, or confidentiality evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Togolese legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, current-law status, and legal sufficiency before relying on the automated result.
